subcodes.first_line: This is what the All-Merciful hath sent down in the Qur'an: Men whom neither commerce nor trade beguileth from the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما انزله الرحمن فی الفرقان رجال لا تلهیم تجاره و لا بیع عن ذکر الله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
